description: §6.3.2 Variant-C ad-hoc compound state — a `<formRes>` cell with structural-child fields name/email. fill() does canonical dot-nav writes (@formRes.name = 'Alice', @formRes.email = ...); each field's nested reactive cell updates and re-renders its own interpolation. Fields snapshot under dotted keys (formRes.name / formRes.email).
rationale: §6.3.2 Variant-C ad-hoc compound: a cell with structural-child fields (name/email). A canonical dot-nav write (@formRes.name = ...) updates that field's nested reactive cell and re-renders its interpolation; the sibling field is independent.
